name: The Arc Minnesota
description: State chapter of The Arc promoting and protecting the rights of people with intellectual and developmental disabilities in Minnesota.
address: 800 Transfer Rd., Suite 7A, St. Paul, MN 55114

name: Minnesota Help Me Grow / Early Intervention
description: Minnesota's early intervention program connecting families of infants and toddlers with developmental concerns to services from birth to age 3.

name: Special Olympics Minnesota
description: Year-round sports training and athletic competition for Minnesotans with intellectual disabilities.

name: Gillette Children's Specialty Healthcare
description: Specialized pediatric healthcare for children with complex medical conditions, disabilities, and rare conditions.
address: 200 University Ave. E., St. Paul, MN 55101

name: Minnesota Disability Law Center
description: Minnesota's designated protection and advocacy organization providing free legal services for people with disabilities.

name: Minnesota STAR Program (System of Technology to Achieve Results)
description: Statewide assistive technology program providing device demonstrations, loans, and information for Minnesotans with disabilities.

name: Minnesota ABLE Account
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts for eligible Minnesotans with disabilities to save without affecting means-tested benefits.

name: Minnesota Department of Human Services - Disability Services Division
description: State agency providing disability services, Medicaid waivers, and supports for Minnesotans with disabilities.

name: Camp Courage (True Friends)
description: Residential camp for children and adults with disabilities providing adaptive recreation, horseback riding, and outdoor experiences.

name: PACER Center
description: National parent training and information center based in Minnesota, providing support and resources for families of children with disabilities.

name: Minnesota Vocational Rehabilitation Services
description: State services helping Minnesotans with disabilities prepare for, find, and maintain competitive employment.

name: Minnesota Medicaid Home and Community-Based Waivers
description: Medicaid waiver programs providing home and community-based services for Minnesotans with disabilities.

name: Metro Mobility Paratransit
description: ADA paratransit service providing demand-responsive transportation for eligible riders with disabilities in the Twin Cities metro area.

name: Fraser Therapy Services
description: Comprehensive pediatric therapy services including occupational, physical, speech, and mental health therapy for children with disabilities.
